duplicate_major_exceptions.rationale: Clipline and the pinned clipline-cloud-api use reqwest 0.12, while tauri-plugin-updater uses reqwest 0.13. Moving either first-party caller alone would retain both stacks and split Clipline from its cloud API; downgrading the updater would give up current security fixes.
duplicate_major_exceptions.remove_when: Align as soon as clipline-cloud-api and tauri-plugin-updater support the same reqwest release line; verify cargo tree contains one reqwest package before removing this exception.

controlled_forks.rationale: The maintained 2026.1.0 binding replaces unmaintained audiopus_sys. Clipline's fork fixes the upstream Windows prebuilt filename mismatch and pins the reviewed Windows and Ubuntu release hashes locally instead of trusting a checksum downloaded beside the artifact.
controlled_forks.remove_when: Return to the crates.io release after upstream supports opus.lib on Windows and embeds immutable per-target artifact hashes, or migrate to a stronger maintained binding with equivalent codec tests.
